parameters.$filter: (_cr6b0_relatedproject_value eq '@{outputs('Get_a_row_by_ID_-_Projects')?['body/cr6b0_projectid']}'@{variables('Parent Project')}@{variables('Child Project')}) and cr6b0_usedforreporting eq 1 and _cr6b0_consultant_value eq '@{triggerOutputs()?['body/_cr6b0_consultant_value']}' and cr6b0_quotedtype eq @{items('Apply_to_each_4')?['quotedtype']}

(_cr6b0_relatedproject_value eq '@{outputs('Get_a_row_by_ID_-_Projects')?['body/cr6b0_projectid']}'@{variables('Parent Project')}@{variables('Child Project')}) and cr6b0_usedforreporting ne 1 and _cr6b0_consultant_value eq '@{triggerOutputs()?['body/_cr6b0_consultant_value']}' and cr6b0_quotedtype eq @{items('Apply_to_each_4')?['quotedtype']}

parameters.fetchXml:
<fetch distinct="false" aggregate="true">
  <entity name="cr6b0_projectresourcing">
    
    <!-- Group By Quoted Type-->
    <attribute name="cr6b0_quotedtype" groupby="true" alias="quotedtype"
/>

    <!-- Months -->
    <attribute name="cr6b0_january" aggregate="sum" alias="january" />
    <attribute name="cr6b0_february" aggregate="sum" alias="february" />
    <attribute name="cr6b0_march" aggregate="sum" alias="march" />
    <attribute name="cr6b0_april" aggregate="sum" alias="april" />
    <attribute name="cr6b0_may" aggregate="sum" alias="may" />
    <attribute name="cr6b0_june" aggregate="sum" alias="june" />
    <attribute name="cr6b0_july" aggregate="sum" alias="july" />
    <attribute name="cr6b0_august" aggregate="sum" alias="august" />
    <attribute name="cr6b0_september" aggregate="sum" alias="september" />
    <attribute name="cr6b0_october" aggregate="sum" alias="october" />
    <attribute name="cr6b0_november" aggregate="sum" alias="november" />
    <attribute name="cr6b0_december" aggregate="sum" alias="december" />

    <!-- Weeks 1–53 -->
    <attribute name="cr6b0_week1" aggregate="sum" alias="week1" />
    <attribute name="cr6b0_week2" aggregate="sum" alias="week2" />
    <attribute name="cr6b0_week3" aggregate="sum" alias="week3" />
    <attribute name="cr6b0_week4" aggregate="sum" alias="week4" />
    <attribute name="cr6b0_week5" aggregate="sum" alias="week5" />
